what_does_this_place_look_like.answer: Approach: Black-red ramparts, forge smoke, and ash-banner civic markers announce a city accustomed to heat, rebuilding, and rule.. what_is_this_area_known_for.answer: Central fortified seat of Psanan where Great House rule, forge prestige, and civic renewal ceremony visibly converge.
